description_long: This is a plush, cartoon-like stuffed toy with a rounded, orange body and two large, pointed ears on top. Its face features wide, oval eyes and a large, open-mouthed smile in purple, giving it a cheerful and friendly appearance. The toy has two short, outstretched arms and two stubby legs, all seamlessly attached to the main body. On its front, there is a black symbol or character printed on its lower torso. The back of the toy is plain, with no additional markings or features. The overall design is simple, soft, and inviting, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A soft, orange stuffed toy with pointed ears, a smiling face, and a black symbol on its front. It has outstretched arms and stubby legs, giving it a playful and friendly look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smiling face, pointed ears, outstretched arms, and a black symbol on the lower torso.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the toy's rounded profile, protruding ear, and the thickness of the body.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain, unmarked surface and the symmetrical placement of the ears and limbs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the rounded body and ear from the other side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and happy, with wide, oval eyes and a large, open-mouthed smile. The mouth is purple and the eyes are black, giving a friendly and inviting look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms outstretched to the sides and legs slightly apart.
